name: Pinterest icon links to the correct external URL
description:
As a user visiting the Sauce Demo site
  I want all header and footer links to be visible and navigate to the correct pages
  So that I can browse the site without broken or misdirected links
descriptionHtml:
As a user visiting the Sauce Demo site
I want all header and footer links to be visible and navigate to the correct pages
So that I can browse the site without broken or misdirected links
statusMessage: Link destination does not match. Expected: http://www.pinterest.com/chrisjhoughton/awesome-facebook-integration/, Got: https://www.pinterest.com/chrisjhoughton/social-design/
statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: Link destination does not match. Expected: http://www.pinterest.com/chrisjhoughton/awesome-facebook-integration/, Got: https://www.pinterest.com/chrisjhoughton/social-design/
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at com.retail.stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.verifyLinkDestination(CommonSteps.java:103)
	at ✽.the link destination should be "http://www.pinterest.com/chrisjhoughton/awesome-facebook-integration/"(file:///home/runner/work/CucumberPractice/CucumberPractice/src/test/resources/features/header/header.feature:151)

steps.name: Given  I am on the Sauce Demo homepage "https://sauce-demo.myshopify.com/"
When  I click the Pinterest icon in the side navigation
Then  the link destination should be "http://www.pinterest.com/chrisjhoughton/awesome-facebook-integration/"
